description: Contact already attended a previous masterclass, mentions a competitor, declines politely

transcript.content: Hi Arun, this is Priya calling from Freedom with AI. How are you doing today?
Oh hi. I've attended one of your sessions before actually.
That's great to hear, Arun! We have a new masterclass this Saturday covering advanced AI automation strategies. It's different from the introductory one.
Actually I've already started using Zapier and ChatGPT for my business. I also tried that Digital Pratik's course on automation. I think I'm covered for now.
I see, sounds like you're already making good progress with AI tools. This session goes deeper into custom workflows and AI agents, which is beyond what most courses cover.
Hmm interesting but I don't think I need another session right now. Maybe if you have something more advanced later, like building custom AI tools, I'd be interested.
Got it. We're actually working on an advanced workshop series. Should I keep you posted when that launches?
Yes, that would be good. You can message me about that one.
I'll make sure you're notified. Thanks for your time, Arun. It's great that you're already ahead of the curve!
